description.value:
Cost: 1 Effect: Communicate briefly with allies or enemies.

Free Actions

Free actions require no significant time or effort and can be performed alongside other actions. Free Action Limits You can take a reasonable number of [Free] actions per turn (typically 1-3), subject to GM discretion. GM may rule that excessive free actions (like dropping 20 items) require actual action costs. Free actions can typically be taken at any point during your turn.

system.effect:
Communicate briefly with allies or enemies.

## Free Actions
Free actions require no significant time or effort and can be performed alongside other actions.
Free Action Limits
You can take a reasonable number of [Free] actions per turn (typically 1-3), subject to GM discretion.  GM may rule that excessive free actions (like dropping 20 items) require actual action costs. Free actions can typically be taken at any point during your turn.
